path: Problem: Extract a de-duplicated list of unique text values from a single-column range into an adjacent column without dynamic arrays
Action: Use INDEX + MATCH to return the next unseen item, with COUNTIF to flag already-returned values and IFERROR to blank remaining rows (entered as a legacy array formula and filled down)

Observation: COUNTIF([output_so_far],[source_range]) produces a per-item occurrence count; matching the first 0 finds the next value not yet listed, enabling sequential unique extraction when copied down
